title: sorghum trichozygum
intro: Sorghum trichozygum, also known as broomcorn millet, is a type of flowering plant native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the sorghum family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as supporting immune function and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Sorghum trichozygum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by boiling the roots and stems in water or steeping them in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
